## LibraryRuntime.IBarTruffle interface

Runtime confection narrowed to bar truffle type.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IBarTruffle extends IConfectionBase 
```
**Extends:** [IConfectionBase](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.iconfectionbase.md)
